measurement_note: Size is L, the number of distinct login rows. The 64/256/1024 tiers span 16x and give one account logins every other day, so no five-day streak exists and every possible start must be examined. Deduplication, window ordering, and island grouping take O(L log L). A correct query that correlates every start date with a count over its following four-day window takes O(L^2) without index assistance, completes normally, and is rejected by scaling.
